rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Inbound tracking is fully manual (no carrier-portal auto-fetch). transportMode {Air|Sea|Road|Courier} drives the document set: Air = MAWB/HAWB + airline/flight + origin/dest airport; Sea = B/L + vessel + POL/POD (always a road-haulage leg after customs); Road = LR + transporter (cross-border

clears a border Bayan); Courier = tracking number (no customs node). ETA is editable throughout; the ETA-approaching alarm fires a configurable lead (default 5 days) before ETA to handler, requester and manager.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Two receipt paths. Materials (RM/PM): Store receives

-> COA + sample to QC -> QC inspect (HARD BLOCK if no COA) -> qty tolerance (+/-5-10% amends PO before GRN for labels/cartons; 0% for fixed-pack RM and contract glass) -> GRN raised -> GR/IR accrued + commitment relieved to actual. Spares/Services: Engineering receives directly -> cl
oses requisition 'received as per order' (NO GRN) -> downstream match is TWO-WAY. QC/QA always compare against the requisition; the PO stays procurement-only.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Derived delivery status (never stored, recomputed live): item delivered (delivered>=ordered) > partial (0<delivered<ordered) > overdue (delivered=0 AND needDate<start-of-today; null needDate never overdue) > upcoming. Ticket: all delivered > any partial > any overdue > upcoming. Multiple

GRNs/blocks per PO for partial deliveries; delivered qty aggregated per ticketItemId across all blocks. Stage advances PARTIAL_DELIVERY -> POST_DELIVERY when mandatory block + schedule fields are filled; advancing does not COMPLETE the ticket (needs all verticals APPROVED).
